name: obsidian-vault-keeper
description: An active Obsidian vault steward you summon whenever you work in your vault. The vault-keeper agent maintains your vault to best practices through the Obsidian MCP (CLI or filesystem fallback): captures and files notes into PARA, builds and refreshes MOC index notes, fixes broken [[links]] and finds orphans, normalizes frontmatter properties, safely dedupes and renames, and runs the employer/archive lifecycle. Backed by the obsidian-vault skill (the official Obsidian style guide, PARA vault organization, MCP-aware maintenance workflows, and Dataview/Templates) and a /vault-checkup command that runs a read-only health sweep, reports findings, and offers to fix. Complements the required official obsidian plugin (by Steph Ango/kepano): it owns vault stewardship and defers all Obsidian authoring syntax — Markdown, Bases, Canvas — to that plugin's skills rather than duplicating them.
